_comments.AzureWebJobsStorage: Required by Functions runtime. Use 'UseDevelopmentStorage=true' for Azurite.
_comments.STORAGE: Connection string for Table/Blob storage. For local dev with Azurite, use the full connection string, this is publicly known.
_comments.GRAPH_TENANT_ID: Azure AD tenant ID for Microsoft Graph API access (required for Intune app creation).
_comments.GRAPH_CLIENT_ID: App registration client ID for Microsoft Graph API access.
_comments.GRAPH_CLIENT_SECRET: App registration client secret for Microsoft Graph API access.
_comments.SENDGRID_API_KEY: Optional: SendGrid API key for email notifications on run completion.
_comments.SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL: Sender email address for SendGrid notifications.
_comments.TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL: Optional: Teams incoming webhook URL for run completion notifications.
_comments.ROLE_ADMIN_GROUP_ID: Azure AD security group object ID mapped to the 'admin' app role.
_comments.ROLE_PACKAGER_GROUP_ID: Azure AD security group object ID mapped to the 'packager' app role.
